narrative:
Hancock County has 49,546 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.3% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.4% D−R vs -39.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
